products.name: Merino Wool Overcoat

material: Lining: 100% Cupro for breathability and effortless layering.
care: Dry clean only - do not machine wash or tumble dry.

Store on a wide, padded hanger to maintain structure.
Avoid prolonged exposure to direct sunlight to prevent fading.
